text.message: blue, i think i gotta go wood port.  i can't figure out a better spot.
this is so bad tho, black gets too much...
Red any deal you want to make to not plow wood port?
anywhere else i go, i have a busted hand all game
deal would have been for you to go 6-11-12
i think it's gotta be black
Blacks gonna run away with this i fear
they have half the board to settle
yea lets table talk and rob me every time
though if only 9/10 roll, it's oj :)
Orange you’re in lead with 3 devs
uh, didn't think you'd do that with my ore.  lol
just to buy a dev.  lol
i wanted to take that.  lol
i guess black can't settle the west if 11s roll zero times.
of course a brick rolls after oj settles it. ha ha.  <ok will stop complaining>
nice table talk though pre game
Based on initial setup you were def strongest
well, thought there'd be one or two 11s
and you'd be able to settle
You had insane space and road game
your inability to say "my bad" lol
table talking to get everyone to rob me
my bad for not predicting the dice correctly.  is that what you want to hear?
And robbed you before I said that
